channel.title: How to delete browser cache
channel.description: Hi, I have recently updated functions and deployed. but customers are saying that they're having errors on their browsers. It works fine on incognito mode. but we have many customers and we can't say them all delete their browser caches and try again. We deployed on vercel. How can I solve this problem?

item.title: How to delete browser cache
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @nuttawitpanyason

It’s possible to set expiration times on cached resources. You can also prevent caching for certain resources if necessary. See here and here for more info.

Read full topic

item.title: How to delete browser cache
item.dc:creator: nuttawitpanyason
item.description:
Hi, I have recently updated functions and deployed.
but customers are saying that they’re having errors on their browsers.
It works fine on incognito mode. but we have many customers and we can’t say them all delete their browser caches and try again.
We deployed on vercel.
How can I solve this problem?

Read full topic
